name: automerge-swift
description: Automerge Swift CRDT skills, commands, and hooks — Document API, Codable mapping, sync protocol, auditing, and guardrails
author: sitapix

skills.name: automerge-swift
skills.description: Use when working with Automerge Swift, automerge-swift package, CRDTs in Swift, collaborative/real-time data, Document merge/fork/sync, or any code importing Automerge. Routes to specialized sub-skills for core API, Codable mapping, sync protocol, and API reference.

skills.name: automerge-swift-core
skills.description: Use when creating Automerge documents, navigating with ObjId, reading/writing maps/lists/text using the core Document API, working with ScalarValue or Value types, or needing fine-grained control over document mutations.

skills.name: automerge-swift-codable
skills.description: Use when encoding/decoding Swift Codable types to/from Automerge documents, working with AutomergeEncoder or AutomergeDecoder, using AutomergeText for collaborative text fields, using Counter for concurrent counters, or choosing SchemaStrategy.

skills.name: automerge-swift-text
skills.description: Use when working with collaborative text editing in Automerge — AutomergeText, Cursor, Position, Mark, ExpandMark, spliceText, updateText, text marks/formatting, or building a collaborative text editor.

skills.name: automerge-swift-sync
skills.description: Use when synchronizing Automerge documents between peers, implementing sync protocols over network/WebSocket, forking and merging documents, tracking change history, using patches for UI updates, or working with SyncState types.

skills.name: automerge-swift-modeling
skills.description: Use when designing Automerge document schemas, choosing between Text and String, structuring nested data for correct merges, solving the initial data problem, or setting up UTType/Transferable for file sharing.

skills.name: automerge-swift-diag
skills.description: Use when debugging Automerge Swift errors, decoding failures, binding crashes, sync message corruption, type conversion errors, schema mismatches after merge, or any Automerge runtime problem.

skills.name: automerge-swift-ref
skills.description: Use when you need to look up a specific Automerge Swift API — method signatures, property types, error types, enum cases, or protocol conformances. Dense reference for quick lookup.
